name: dnb-book-lookup
title: DNB Book Lookup
description: Look up book contents from Deutsche Nationalbibliothek by ISBN with optional AI-generated Klappentext
author: wdeu

commands.name: lookup-book
commands.title: Look up DNB Book
commands.description: Look up book contents in the Deutsche Nationalbibliothek by ISBN

preferences.name: generateKlappentext
preferences.title: Generate Klappentext
preferences.label: Generate AI Klappentext from table of contents
preferences.description: Generates a Klappentext (max. 150 words) and keywords. Requires Raycast Pro or BYOK.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
